## Evidence and Context

<!-- Link the affected page or section and explain the impact. -->

## Expected Behavior

## Scope and Non-scope

<!-- State which documents should and should not change. -->

## Risk Classification

- Statistical:
- Security:

## Checklist

- [ ] The affected audience, location, and problem are clear.
- [ ] Expected behavior and acceptance criteria are observable.
- [ ] Scope, non-scope, risks, dependencies, and owner are identified.
- [ ] Proposed examples use only safe data.
- [ ] This request contains no secrets, client data, or embargoed vulnerability details.
